name: SSH Bridge
description: Execute remote commands and transfer files over SSH/SFTP on remote machines. Supports sync execution, async long-running jobs (model downloads, Docker builds), and multi-line deployment scripts. Designed as a CD deployment target for GitHub Actions.

connector.description: Execute remote commands and transfer files over SSH/SFTP on remote machines. Supports sync execution, async long-running jobs, and multi-line deployment scripts.

endpoints.name: health
endpoints.description: Bridge health check — pool stats, job counts, uptime

endpoints.name: exec-command
endpoints.description: Execute a command synchronously (max 5 min). Returns stdout, stderr, exitCode.

endpoints.name: exec-async
endpoints.description: Execute a long-running command asynchronously. Returns jobId for polling.

endpoints.name: exec-script
endpoints.description: Upload and execute a multi-line deployment script. Always async, returns jobId.

endpoints.name: get-job
endpoints.description: Get async job status, output, and exit code

endpoints.name: get-job-logs
endpoints.description: Tail logs of a running async job with offset pagination

endpoints.name: upload-file
endpoints.description: Upload a file to a remote machine via SFTP (max 50MB, base64 encoded)

endpoints.name: download-file
endpoints.description: Download a file from a remote machine via SFTP (max 50MB, base64 encoded)

endpoints.name: list-directory
endpoints.description: List remote directory contents with file metadata

endpoints.name: test-connection
endpoints.description: Test SSH connectivity to a remote host
